init_hook: echo 'talos-platform-apps devbox-shell aktiv — "task --list" für verfügbare Tasks'
if [ -f lefthook.yml ] && [ ! -f .git/hooks/pre-commit ]; then echo 'Note: git hooks not yet installed. Run: lefthook install'; fi

if command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1; then real_docker=false; if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ "$(command -v docker)" != "$PWD/.direnv/bin/docker" ] && docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then real_docker=true; fi; if [ "$real_docker" = false ]; then if [ -z "${DOCKER_HOST:-}" ]; then sock=$(podman machine inspect --format '{{.ConnectionInfo.PodmanSocket.Path}}' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$sock" ] && [ -S "$sock" ]; then export DOCKER_HOST="unix://$sock"; fi; fi; mkdir -p "$PWD/.direnv/bin"; if [ ! -x "$PWD/.direnv/bin/docker" ]; then printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'exec podman "$@"' > "$PWD/.direnv/bin/docker.tmp" && chmod +x "$PWD/.direnv/bin/docker.tmp" && mv "$PWD/.direnv/bin/docker.tmp" "$PWD/.direnv/bin/docker"; fi; case ":$PATH:" in *":$PWD/.direnv/bin:"*) ;; *) export PATH="$PWD/.direnv/bin:$PATH";; esac; echo 'podman runtime: docker->podman shim + DOCKER_HOST active for task local:* (one-time host setup: podman machine set --rootful --memory 8192)'; fi; fi
